creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Xander from comment #3)
(In reply to Boris Korzun from comment #2)

Thank you for the detail, so to be explicit and clarify:

- The OSS versions did not receive any security related changes to their codebases?
- The inclusion of "Fixes CVE-2022-29170" in the OSS version release notes is incorrect?

In particular, can we point to any commit logs and/or issues for CVE-2022-29170 so we have details of the branches they were applied to, or the absence of said merges to OSS branches?
